title: Daewoo Electric Blanket With 3 Heat Settings, Over Heat Protection, Detachable Controller, Heated Blanket, Single
features: 3 HEAT SETTINGS - This Daewoo heated blanket for home/bedroom use features 3 heat settings so you can adjust to the perfect heat and stay warm & cosy
HANDY CONTROLLER INCLUDED - With the detachable controller included with your heated blanket you can stay where you are comfortable – Designed for your control and convenience
HIGH-QUALITY 450GSM POLYESTER - This Daewoo heated blanket is made from high-quality 450gsm polyester – Designed for long-lasting use
INDICATOR LIGHT - The indicator light notifies you when your heated blanket is on and ready to use – Also a handy feature for reminding you to switch it off
HAND WASHABLE - When it comes time to wash your heated blanket simply remove the controller and wash this blanket by hand
description: From the manufacturer HANDY CONTROLLER INCLUDED The indicator light notifies you when your heated blanket is on and ready to use - A handy feature if you've left it on and need reminding to switch it off 3 HEAT SETTINGS This Daewoo heated blanket for home/bedroom use features 3 heat settings so you can adjust to the perfect heat and stay warm & cosy. HIGH-QUALITY 450GSM POLYESTER This Daewoo heated blanket is made from high-quality 450gsm polyester designed for long-lasting use. Feel warm and cosy under our Electric Blanket. A detachable controller is included with your heated blanket for control and convenience. Control the level of heat produced from the blanket, it had three heat settings to fit your needs. Safety and security are our main priority at Daewoo that's why our heating products come with built in overheat protection. This electric blanket is powered by a standard UK Type G Plug and is suitable for mains powered.
